prompt: One-point perspective down a long symmetrical corridor — all lines converging to a single vanishing point at center frame. Cold blue-white fluorescent overhead lighting. Hard tile or polished floor reflecting the lights. Oppressive symmetry — the corridor feels infinite and sterile. No people. Clinical, unsettling, perfectly geometric, 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
